title: A Jerky Is a Promise: Skatzbitt
overview: Melphiera is old enough to find a husband, but she's more interested in cooking... monsters.

title: A Proposal from Above with a Gift
overview: The duke visits Melphie in Marchalrayd's lands to ask for her hand in marriage.

title: Grilled Skewers of Prime Meat: Royal Moodle
overview: Melphie demonstrates how to prepare a royal moodle for consumption.

title: Signaling Departure with a Pillar of Flame
overview: Melphie accepts the Duke's proposal and prepares to move to the Galbraith family's lands.

title: Night at Fort Ritterd
overview: Melphie fries up a fish monster for the Duke and his knights.

title: In Season: Battered and Deep-Fried Monster Fish.
overview: Melphie fries up a fish monster for the Duke and his knights.

title: Those Who Inherit the Galbraith Name
overview: Melphiera loves monster meat. It doesn’t seem like anyone else agrees—until she meets the “Blood-Mad Duke.”

title: Uses for Cloudy Quartz
overview: Melphie devises a clever way to deal with a flock of bird monsters.

title: The Voracious Villainess's Resolve
overview: Melphiera loves monster meat. It doesn’t seem like anyone else agrees—until she meets the “Blood-Mad Duke.”

title: The Blood-Mad Duke's Intentions
overview: Melphie asks the Duke to bring her the fruit of a screamwood.

title: Sweet or Sour Fruit
overview: Melphie and the Blanche Corps share a screamwood fruit, and the Duke presents Melphie with a second gift.

title: The Voracious Villainess's First Appearance
overview: Melphiera does her best to make a good first impression on the people of Galbraith.
